function.name: InternVL3.5-38B-Instruct
function.description: Invoke the InternVL3.5-38B vision-language model for high-precision image understanding and multimodal reasoning. Suitable for complex visual question answering and detailed analysis tasks.

prompt.description: The instruction for the model, describing what to analyze or answer from the image.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: InternVL3.5-14B-Instruct
function.description: Invoke the InternVL3.5-14B vision-language model for efficient image understanding and multimodal reasoning with lower latency than larger variants.

prompt.description: The instruction for the model, describing what to analyze or answer from the image.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: step3
function.description: Invoke StepFun Step-3 via OpenAI-compatible chat completions for advanced multimodal reasoning on image+text inputs.

prompt.description: The instruction sent to Step-3 describing what to analyze or answer from the image.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the image to analyze in the current environment.

function.name: WolframAlpha
function.description: Invoke the Wolfram|Alpha computational knowledge engine for symbolic math, scientific facts, unit conversion, and structured computational queries. English queries are recommended.

query.description: The natural-language or symbolic query, e.g. 'solve x^2+2x-3=0' or 'convert 10 miles to km'.

function.name: UniChart
function.description: Use UniChart for chart understanding and chart question answering. It reads chart images and returns a text answer based on the provided prompt.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the chart image to analyze in the current environment.

prompt.description: Optional chart QA prompt. If omitted, the service default prompt is used.

function.name: Deplot
function.description: Use Deplot to convert chart images into underlying tabular data text. Suitable for extracting structured data from plots.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the chart image to process in the current environment.

prompt.description: Optional extraction prompt. If omitted, the service default prompt is used.

function.name: ChartMoe
function.description: Use ChartMoe to understand chart images and generate chart-focused analysis or reconstruction-oriented text/code responses.

image_index.description: The 1-based index of the chart image to analyze in the current environment.

prompt.description: Optional instruction for ChartMoe. If omitted, the service default prompt is used.

function.name: python_code
function.description: Execute Python code in a restricted sandbox for calculations and data processing. Returns text output.

stdin.description: Optional stdin passed to the code.

function.name: create_skill
function.description: Create a reusable skill when existing tools are insufficient. Put requirement text in arguments.description.

description.description: What the new skill should do and when to use it.

function.name: run_skill
function.description: Run a skill entrypoint script (.py/.sh) and return textual output. Arguments must follow SKILL.md / SKILL_SPEC definition.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to run.

entrypoint.description: Relative script path under the target skill directory.
